title: Semantik Architect Frame Schema — Relational: Role / position / office
description: Schema for role-, position-, and office-holding relations. This frame models a holder entity together with a title/office label, optional organization or jurisdiction, optional term boundaries, and predecessor/successor context. Entity-shaped fields are normalized through the shared EntityRef contract.

frame_type.description: Canonical frame identifier for the role / position / office family.

frame_family.description: Optional high-level family label; always relational for this frame.

id.description: Optional stable identifier for this role relation instance, such as a statement ID or normalized relation-cluster ID.

holder.description: Entity holding the role or office (typically a person).

title_lemma.description: Lemma-level label for the role, position, or office, e.g. 'prime minister', 'president', or 'professor of physics'.

organization.description: Organization, institution, or body associated with the role, such as a government, university, company, club, or committee.

jurisdiction.description: Jurisdiction or territorial unit over which the office has authority, such as a country, province, municipality, or district.

start.description: Time span for the start of the term in office.

end.description: Time span for the end of the term in office, if applicable.

predecessor.description: Entity representing the predecessor in this role or office, if known.

successor.description: Entity representing the successor in this role or office, if known.

acting.description: Whether the holder is/was serving in an acting, interim, or caretaker capacity.

status.description: Optional status label for the role-holding, such as 'current', 'former', 'designate', 'interim', or 'vacant'.

certainty.description: Optional certainty / confidence score for this role relation. Numeric scores should be between 0.0 and 1.0.

source_id.description: Optional identifier for the upstream source record or statement from which this role relation was derived.

attributes.description: Free-form attribute bag for additional lightly structured details not yet promoted to first-class fields, such as appointment method, electoral mandate, cabinet portfolio, chamber, constituency, or rank qualifiers.

extra.description: Reserved for pipeline- or source-specific metadata that should not affect generation but may be useful for debugging, provenance, or analysis.

office_lemma.description: Legacy field: office title lemma. Prefer 'title_lemma' for new data.

office_holder.description: Legacy field: office holder entity. Prefer 'holder' for new data.

body.description: Legacy field: body or organization associated with the office. Prefer 'organization' and/or 'jurisdiction' for new data.

start_time.description: Legacy field: term start time. Prefer 'start' (TimeSpan).

end_time.description: Legacy field: term end time. Prefer 'end' (TimeSpan).

TimeSpan.description: Coarse time span or single date for a term in office. Mirrors the lightweight frame-level time shapes already used elsewhere in the schema set.

approximate.description: Whether the temporal information is approximate.
